case_title: AGPME HOTELS, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. H20 PLUS LP, AN ILLINOIS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT H2O PLUS, LLC, AN ILLINOIS LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
